name: vault-share
description: Share vaults between devices and users through Google Drive.

scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
scripts.test:coverage:e2e: rm -rf .nyc_output coverage-e2e && npm run build:coverage && wdio run wdio.ui.conf.mts && npm run coverage:report:e2e
scripts.test:coverage:e2e:single: rm -rf .nyc_output coverage-e2e && npm run build:coverage && wdio run wdio.conf.mts && wdio run wdio.ui.conf.mts && npm run coverage:report:e2e
scripts.test:coverage:all: npm run test:coverage && npm run test:coverage:e2e && npm run test:coverage:combined
scripts.test:e2e:single: npm run build && wdio run wdio.conf.mts
scripts.test:e2e:single:interactive: npm run build && WDIO_HEADLESS=false wdio run wdio.conf.mts
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run build && wdio run wdio.ui.conf.mts
scripts.test:e2e:ui:interactive: npm run build && WDIO_HEADLESS=false wdio run wdio.ui.conf.mts
scripts.test:e2e:cross: npm run build && wdio run wdio.multiremote.conf.mts
scripts.test:e2e:cross:interactive: npm run build && WDIO_HEADLESS=false wdio run wdio.multiremote.conf.mts
scripts.test:e2e:scale:single: npm run build && WDIO_SCALE=true wdio run wdio.conf.mts
scripts.test:e2e:scale:cross: npm run build && WDIO_SCALE=true wdio run wdio.multiremote.conf.mts
scripts.test:e2e:scale: npm run test:e2e:scale:single && npm run test:e2e:scale:cross
